indications.text:
ZYVOX is indicated for the treatment of infections caused by susceptible strains of the designated microorganisms
in the specific conditions listed below. ZYVOX is not indicated for the treatment of Gram-negative infections. It is
critical that specific Gram-negative therapy be initiated immediately...
